scripts.dev: concurrently "wrangler dev --port 4001 --ip 0.0.0.0" "wrangler dev -e clone2 --port 4002 --ip 0.0.0.0" "wrangler dev -e clone3 --port 4003 --ip 0.0.0.0"
scripts.dev:remote: concurrently "wrangler dev --port 4001 --ip 0.0.0.0 --remote" "wrangler dev -e clone2 --port 4002 --ip 0.0.0.0 --remote" "wrangler dev -e clone3 --port 4003 --ip 0.0.0.0 --remote"
scripts.deploy: concurrently "wrangler deploy --minify" "wrangler deploy -e clone2 --minify" "wrangler deploy -e clone3 --minify"
